heading: First replenishment of the resources of the Enterprise for the Americas Multilateral Investment Fund
label: 283z–11 First replenishment of the resources of the Enterprise for the Americas Multilateral Investment Fund

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury may contribute on behalf of the United States $150,000,000 to the first replenishment of the resources of the Enterprise for the Americas Multilateral Investment Fund.

children.heading: Subject to appropriations
children.label: 2 Subject to appropriations
children.text: The authority provided by paragraph (1) may be exercised only to the extent and in the amounts provided for in advance in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Limitations on authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Limitations on authorization of appropriations
children.text: For the United States contribution authorized by subsection (a), there are authorized to be appropriated not more than $150,000,000, without fiscal year limitation, for payment by the Secretary of the Treasury.
